meetings.title: Minute Media / Elsa
meetings.notes: Elsa said the purchase by Axel Springer has slowed down commercial conversations. Will need to wait for the dust to settle.

meetings.title: SoundCloud / Ben
meetings.notes: Ben offered to introduce me to head of monetisation via email. Very audio heavy vs display/video.

meetings.title: Paramount
meetings.notes: CTV focus, Freewheel + Springserve stack, own Conduit integration layer into Magnite/AdX. CTV mostly sold out. Next: ops/tech call.

linkedin.text: LinkedIn reply from InDrive contact: Thanks for reaching out Dan — could you email details about adding BidMachine demand to stack?

meetings.title: Trade House Media / Post Industria
meetings.notes: They use Post Industria (Pubmatic SDK). Need ~$25K dev work. Re-pitching Sinclair account vs FreeStar.

meetings.title: News Corp / Tim
meetings.notes: Tim promoted to Head of Ops. Run in-house mediation GAM+TAM+Ozone. Evaluating BidMachine parallel/cached bidding. Use webview for ad units.

meetings.title: What3words product lead
meetings.notes: Starting ad monetisation. Using SetUpAd for prebid. SDK size a concern. Open to Q3 launch.

meetings.title: Venatus (Sam)
meetings.notes: No direct app inventory. Two channels: Google MCN and curation via Index Exchange (Unity, Rovio).

meetings.title: NewsUK / Guillaume coffee
meetings.notes: Partners need direct placement on ads.txt. Evaluate demand on incremental spend via second-best-bid model. Current partners: Magnite, Google, Ozone.

meetings.title: Match Media Group / Gregg intro
meetings.notes: Match acquired Sniffy's (Grindr competitor). Lisette no longer in Programmatic — introducing Dan to Greg Murphy.

meetings.title: Beeler Tech — 9 contacts
meetings.notes: 9 contacts logged. Sim (Warner Bros) and Noeleen (Fandom) strongest leads. Webview flagged as SDK blocker.

meetings.title: Fandom / Noeleen Boyle
meetings.notes: Intro via Beeler. Will connect to internal stack/monetisation owner.
